name: BOMKart
description: Order BOM components from local Indian distributors directly from KiCad. Real-time pricing, Uber-style distributor confirmation, next-day delivery in Delhi-NCR.
description_full:
BOMKart integrates with your KiCad PCB design workflow to let you order components from local Indian electronics distributors.

Features:
- One-click BOM extraction from your PCB design
- Real-time pricing and availability from 10+ Delhi-NCR distributors
- MPN, LCSC, Mouser, DigiKey part number cross-referencing
- Smart value matching (100nF = 0.1uF = 100n)
- Export BOM to CSV
- Next-day delivery in Delhi-NCR

No more hunting across markets or waiting weeks for international shipments.
